ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "f_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "l_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "job_id" TEXT /* ID of the job role assigned to the employee */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number (for internal use only) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_roles ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "head_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_roles" (
  "job_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each job role */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the job role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job role */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job role */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Skills required for the job role */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Key responsibilities of the job role */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits associated with the job role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the document belongs to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., resume, performance review) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_documents_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job history entry */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "job_id" TEXT /* ID of the job role */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the job */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the job */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the job change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_roles ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department history entry */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date in the department */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date in the department */,
  "reason_for_transfer" TEXT /* Reason for the department transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_history_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_history_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managerial_hierarchy" (
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the managerial relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the managerial relationship */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Level in the managerial hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_id", "manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team is working on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_leader_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date in the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date in the team */,
  "role_in_team" TEXT /* Role of the employee in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, employee) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the employee */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback given to the employee */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the review */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary history entry */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the salary */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the salary */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of salary payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the benefit */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)
